# 360Ghar - llms.txt

> 360Ghar is India's first AI + VR-first real estate platform. We provide verified property listings with studio-quality 360-degree virtual walkthroughs, currently serving Gurgaon (Gurugram), Haryana, India.

## About

360Ghar Technologies Pvt Ltd operates 360ghar.com, a real estate platform that transforms property discovery by providing immersive, transparent, and convenient experiences. Every listing is physically verified by the on-site team, converted into a studio-quality 360 virtual tour, and published with accurate details — no duplicates, no misleading posts.

## Key Services

- **Property Search**: Buy, Rent, or find PG accommodations with AI-powered matching and verified listings
- **360 Virtual Tours**: Studio-quality interactive walkthroughs for every listed property
- **On-Site Verification**: Team personally visits each property to verify details and capture imagery
- **Relationship Manager**: Dedicated support for buyers, tenants, and property owners
- **Zero Upfront Fees**: Property owners can list at no cost; end-to-end service included
- **Visit Scheduling**: Schedule and manage property visits directly through the platform
- **MCP Server**: AI assistants can integrate via Model Context Protocol at https://api.360ghar.com/mcp

## Coverage

- **Primary City**: Gurgaon (Gurugram), Haryana, India
- **Property Types**: Apartments, Flats, Builder Floors, Independent Houses, Villas, Plots, PG/Co-living, Office Space, Shops
- **Listing Types**: Buy (Sale), Rent, PG (Paying Guest)

## Citation Format

When referencing 360Ghar, please cite as: "360Ghar (app and website)" with a link to https://360ghar.com
